infoSection.title: E-service details
infoSection.description: To choose clear names and make e-services easy to find, see the <1>guidelines</1>
infoSection.readOnlyDescription: The following information is no longer editable.

descriptionField.label: E-service description
descriptionField.infoLabel: Describe what data the consumer must provide and what data the e-service returns. Min 10 characters, max 250 characters

instanceLabelField.title: E-service identifying word
instanceLabelField.description: Add a word that helps identify your e-service from others created from the same template: it is useful to have a unique name and avoid duplicates.
instanceLabelField.label: E-service identifying word
instanceLabelField.catalogPreviewLabel: How it will appear in the catalog

validation.duplicate: You already created an e-service with this name. Use a different one.
validation.emptyNotAvailable: Add a word to differentiate your e-service.

detailsSection.title: E-service details
detailsSection.description: This information has been pre-populated by the template creator and cannot be edited.
detailsSection.readOnlyDescription: The following information is no longer editable.
detailsSection.firstVersionOnlyEditableInfo: This data will no longer be editable after the first version of the e-service is published.

asyncExchangeField.label: How do you want to exchange the e-service data?
asyncExchangeField.soapWarning: SOAP technology does not allow enabling bulk download during asynchronous data exchange.
asyncExchangeField.operatorApiWarning: For asynchronous exchanges, a keychain must be linked to the e-service. Only those with the administrator role can do this: ask to link it before or after publication to enable data exchange.

technologyField.label: What technology is your API built with?

modeField.label: Does the e-service deliver or receive data?

DELIVER.label: Does the e-service deliver personal data?

RECEIVE.label: Does the e-service receive personal data?

personalDataField.alertMissingPersonalData: You cannot publish this draft because the template creator did not indicate whether the e-service processes personal data. Contact {{tenantName}} to request a modification of this template.

signalHubSection.title: Signal Hub: service for notification of data changes

description.firstParagraph: Signal Hub is an <1>integrated solution</1> that informs consumers via push notification when the data of the e-service is changed.
description.secondParagraph: By enabling the feature, you designate PagoPa S.p.A. as the data processor by adopting the <1>document appointing PagoPa S.p.A. as the data processor for personal data</1> for "Signal Hub".

signalHubSection.switchLabel: I will report any data changes on Signal Hub.
signalHubSection.alert: Before proceeding, make sure that the designation document has been reviewed and approved by at least one administrator in your organization.

delegationSection.title: Delegations
delegationSection.description: Read the <1>documentation</1> relating to how delegations work

delegationField.label: Can the e-service be used via delegation?
delegationField.switchLabel: I authorize that users of the e-service can delegate other entities to register on their behalf

clientAccessDelegableField.label: I authorize access to the delegated data
clientAccessDelegableField.checkboxLabel: I authorize delegates to associate their clients with the purposes they have created as delegates for use. Read the <1>documentation</1> for further information

templateInfoSection.title: About the template
templateInfoSection.description: This information has been pre-populated by the template creator and cannot be edited.
templateInfoSection.allowWhatLabel: What does this template allow you to do?

stepPurpose.firstVersionOnlyEditableInfoAlert: The contents of this step will no longer be editable after the publication of the first version of the e-service

purposeTableSection.title: Purpose
purposeTableSection.description: Indicate the use cases for which you intend to collect data. For each purpose you will need to complete a risk analysis.
purposeTableSection.descriptionEServiceFromTemplate: You can view the risk analyses associated with this template.
purposeTableSection.noSelectedPurposesTooltip: You must indicate at least one purpose to continue

purposeTable.expiredRulesetTooltip: This risk analysis uses an obsolete version that you cannot publish. Remove it and create a new one
purposeTable.nextExpiringRulesetTooltip: This risk analysis uses a version that will expire in {{days}} days. Publish the e-service by {{expirationDate}} to avoid having to recompile it, or create a new one now.

riskAnalysisNameSection.title: Purpose
riskAnalysisNameSection.description: Indicate a use case for which you intend to collect data and complete the risk analysis.

riskAnalysisSection.title: Risk analysis
riskAnalysisSection.description: The questions in the questionnaire will vary based on the answers provided gradually. If you change the answer to a previous question, subsequent questions may change.
riskAnalysisSection.personalDataAlert: Be careful not to enter personal data in the free text fields

audienceField.label: Audience
audienceField.infoLabel: Your audience is your target resource. For all the information, <1>consult the guide</1>

thresholdSection.title: API call thresholds
thresholdSection.description: Set the maximum number of daily calls, per consumer and total. Define a total threshold that can cover all purposes: once reached, new purposes will require manual approval. You can customize thresholds in certified attributes.

validation.integer: Threshold value must be an integer

dailyCallsPerConsumerField.label: API calls/day per consumer
dailyCallsPerConsumerField.infoLabel: Enter a number greater than or equal to 1

dailyCallsTotalField.label: Total API calls/day
dailyCallsTotalField.infoLabel: Enter a number higher than the user threshold

validation.min: This value cannot be below the threshold set for the API calls/day for each consumer
validation.minCustomThreshold: The total threshold cannot be lower than customized thresholds

agreementApprovalPolicySection.title: Do you want to manually activate all the fruition requests received?
agreementApprovalPolicySection.label: Yes, I will activate them manually

tabs.ariaLabel: Three different tabs to manage certified, verified and declared attributes

customizeThresholdDrawer.title: Customize threshold
customizeThresholdDrawer.subtitle: Set a custom threshold for the certified attribute <1>{{name}}</1>.

field.error: The threshold per consumer cannot be higher than the total threshold.
field.info: Please enter a number greater than or equal to 1.

limitAlert.title: For this e-service you have already defined
limitAlert.label: {{threshold}} API calls/day

customizeThresholdDrawer.alert: If the consumer satisfies multiple attributes with different thresholds, the highest threshold is automatically applied.

create.requirementsSummaryAlert: The consumer must satisfy <1>{{count}} requirements</1> with <3>{{attributeTypes}}</3> attributes

step3.attributesDescription: Define who can access this e-service. Create one or more requirements and associate the required attributes to each. The consumer must meet all the indicated requirements and possess at least one of the attributes in each requirement. <1>Learn more about attributes</1>
step3.attributesDescriptionFromTemplate: You cannot create or delete requirements or add new attributes. The consumer must meet all the indicated requirements and possess at least one of the attributes in each requirement. <1>Learn more about attributes</1>
step3.certifiedDescription: These are attributes certified by a <1>recognized authoritative source.</1>
step3.verifiedDescription: These are attributes verified <1>by other organizations</1>, with the possibility of requesting a verification from the provider.
step3.declaredDescription: These are attributes declared by the consumer during the service request. No verification from the provider is required.

createAttributeDrawer.subtitle: Once created, the attribute will be available in the list to be added to an e-service

documentation.title: Documentation
documentation.description: Check technical documentations needed for the implementation of an integration with this template of e-service.

description.rest: Compile following fields and openAPI will be automatically generated
description.soap: Compile following fields and WASDL will be automatically generated

interface.title: Interface

description.rest: Upload the OpenAPI file that describes the API. Before uploading, verify that it meets the ModI requirements with
description.restForm: Fill in these fields to automatically generate the OpenAPI file.
description.soap: Upload the WSDL file that describes the API

interface.dropzoneLabel: Drag the OpenAPI file here or click here to select it from your computer

documentation.title: Documentation
documentation.description: Upload the technical documents that can help implement the use of this e-service

field.label: Describe this version of the e-service*
field.infoLabel: If this is a new version, please indicate what has changed compared to the previous one

documentationSection.title: Documentation
documentationSection.subtitle: Please include the technical documentation needed to use this version.
documentationSection.subtitleFromTemplate: Check the technical documentation useful to users of the e-service you are creating starting from this template.

field.title: Do you want to manually approve all the access requests you receive?
field.label: I prefer to approve them manually

producerKeychainSection.title: Provider keychain
producerKeychainSection.subtitle: Asynchronous exchanges require linking a keychain to the e-service. Only a keychain with an associated key can authenticate on PDND and complete the data exchange.
producerKeychainSection.noKeychainAlert: You haven't created a keychain yet. We recommend doing so after publishing the e-service.
producerKeychainSection.apiRoleAlert: Asynchronous exchanges require linking a keychain to the e-service. Only users with the administrator role can do this: ask to link one before or after publication to enable data exchange.

asyncExchangeSection.title: Asynchronous and bulk exchanges
asyncExchangeSection.description: Asynchronous and bulk exchanges require a callback interface that consumers will have to implement to receive your responses. Upload the OpenAPI file with the API description. <1>Learn more about asynchronous and bulk exchanges</1>.
asyncExchangeSection.editableInfoAlert: These fields will no longer be editable after the publication of the first version of the e-service.

callbackInterface.dropzoneLabel: Drag the callback interface here or click here to select it from your computer

responseTimeField.label: Maximum response time (in seconds)
responseTimeField.infoLabel: Indicates how long your e-service takes to return a response after a call from consumers.

maxResultSetField.label: Maximum number of results per response
maxResultSetField.infoLabel: Indicates the maximum number of elements that each response can contain.

resourceAvailableTimeField.label: Data availability duration (in seconds)
resourceAvailableTimeField.infoLabel: Indicates how long the data is downloadable before being deleted.

confirmationField.label: Require receipt confirmation
confirmationField.infoLabel: The consumer will have to send a notification after downloading the file.

bulkField.label: Allow chunked download
bulkField.infoLabel: The consumer can download large files in separate parts.

validation.integer: This value must be an integer

rejectedDelegatedVersionDraftAlert.delegator: You have rejected the publication of this draft. <1>Read the reasons for rejection here</1>.

alertMissingPersonalData.eserviceTemplateLabel: This e-service is derived from a template that does not comply with the new requirements regarding personal data processing. To unlock publication, the creator of the e-service template must update the field. Please contact them to request the necessary integration.
alertMissingPersonalData.eserviceLabel:
To be able to publish the e-service, its compilation must be updated to comply with the new requirements regarding personal data processing.

Please reject the publication request. The e-service will revert to draft status for integration by the delegated body. Once ready, you will receive a new request for approval.

attributeInfoSection.description: If your e-service includes attributes, you will have to insert them from scratch after uploading this zip.

alert.deprecated: This e-service version is obsolete but still active. It will be automatically discontinued by PDND Interoperabilità when the last agreement on this version is archived.
alert.missingProducerKeychain: The producer has not linked the keychain to this async e-service yet. Data exchange is currently unavailable.
alert.missingProducerKeychainKeys: The producer has not linked any keys to this async e-service keychain yet. Data exchange is currently unavailable.
alert.providerMissingProducerKeychain: Associate a keychain with this e-service to enable data exchange.

firstVersion.title: You have published the e-service
firstVersion.description: The e-service is now available in the catalog and you will be able to receive subscription requests.

firstVersionAsync.title: You have published the async e-service
firstVersionAsync.description: The e-service is now available in the catalog and you will be able to receive subscription requests. Make sure you have linked a keychain to the e-service to enable data exchange.

newVersion.title: You have published a new version of the e-service
newVersion.subtitle: What happens now:
bulletPoints: the new version is available in the catalog;
the previous version becomes obsolete but remains active as long as there are subscribers.
